name: USP消音版 | 锁定
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. A custom paint job of a map pattern overlayed with a bird's eye HUD has been applied. Target acquired
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器饰有特别的地图图案，搭配上鸟瞰视角显示的概念。 目标已锁定
